creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Gian-Simon Purkert from comment #22)

I am sorry, I think I had packet loss on your crash dump given I had to setup a VM with the specific patch level and sources for that.

Could you give me a round-about status again please?  One thing which confuses me is your comparisons to Ethernet which sounded like at some point even that was slow?  Do I misread that?

Also do you have any chance to try stable/13 instead of a release branch?  13.1 was even more rough than things are now but certainly will not get the speed improvements (hopefully life will allow me to have some for 13.2).
